stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

______ the new library opened to the public.

choices.text: After many, years of planning and construction,
After many years of planning and construction
After, many years of planning and construction,
After many years of planning and construction,

explanation: Intro phrase → one comma at the end.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The physicist Marie Curie ______ remains an icon of scientific achievement.

choices.text: , the first woman to win a Nobel Prize
the first woman to win a Nobel Prize
, the first woman to win a Nobel Prize,
the first woman to win a Nobel Prize,

explanation: Nonrestrictive appositive — commas on both sides.

stem:

choices.text: tomatoes, onions, garlic
tomatoes onions, garlic,
tomatoes, onions, garlic,
tomatoes onions garlic

explanation: Four-item series with Oxford comma.
